series_metadata.series_description: The series consists of the Request of Employer for Separation, the employers Notice of Determination of Benefit Rights, Board of Review decision, and any other unemployment related documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: at least three (3) years and when no longer of value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: at least three (3) years and when no longer of value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
